source_description: Sanitized static HTML book-listing page. Exercises CSS selector features: class selectors, attribute selectors (data-id, href), descendant traversal, HTML entities (  &), missing-href anchors, and nested sections (book-list + sidebar). Intended for CSS/XPath rule validation.
sanitization: All text is synthetic placeholder content ('Sample Volume One', 'Author Alpha', 'Tag Alpha'). No real domain (uses relative URLs only). No tracking scripts, no cookies, no accounts, no copyrighted text.

privacy_check.notes: Pure static HTML with synthetic placeholder text; no scripts or external resources.
